nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview: sqlite-vec is a small pure-C vector search SQLite extension storing float, int8, and binary vectors in vec0 virtual tables, with install matrix across languages.

nodes.name: bindings/rust/src/lib.rs
nodes.summary: Rust binding linking the sqlite_vec0 C library, exposing sqlite3_vec_init and a test that auto-registers the extension and queries vec_version().

nodes.name: bindings/rust/build.rs
nodes.summary: Rust build script compiling sqlite-vec.c with SQLITE_CORE defined into the sqlite_vec0 native library via cc.

nodes.name: bindings/python/extra_init.py
nodes.summary: Python helpers serialize_float32 and serialize_int8 that pack float/int lists into the raw byte format sqlite-vec expects.

nodes.name: benchmarks/micro/src/lib.rs
nodes.summary: Micro-benchmark harness init that registers sqlite_vec0 as a SQLite auto-extension for benchmarking.

nodes.name: benchmarks/micro/build.rs
nodes.summary: Build script compiling ../../sqlite-vec.c into sqlite_vec0 for the micro benchmark crate.

nodes.name: examples/sqlite3-cli/core_init.c
nodes.summary: C entrypoint using sqlite3_auto_extension to statically inject sqlite3_vec_init into a custom sqlite3 CLI build.

nodes.name: examples/wasm/wasm.c
nodes.summary: WASM extra-init hook registering sqlite3_vec_init via sqlite3_wasm_extra_init for in-browser SQLite builds.

nodes.name: sqlite-dist.toml
nodes.summary: Distribution manifest defining package metadata and build targets: github releases, sqlpkg, spm, amalgamation, pip, datasette, sqlite_utils, npm, gem.

nodes.name: scripts/vendor.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script vendoring the SQLite amalgamation 3.45.03 into vendor/ for local compilation.

nodes.name: site/project.data.ts
nodes.summary: VitePress data loader reading the VERSION file to expose PROJECT and VERSION to the docs site.

nodes.name: site/package.json
nodes.summary: Docs site built with VitePress, using better-sqlite3, valibot, and js-yaml for reference generation.

nodes.name: benchmarks-ann/datasets/nyt-768/distill-model.py
nodes.summary: Script distilling BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5 to 768 PCA dims via model2vec for ANN benchmark embeddings.

nodes.name: examples/simple-rust/Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Rust demo crate depending on sqlite-vec, rusqlite (bundled), and zerocopy.

nodes.name: site/using/c.md
nodes.summary: Docs stating sqlite-vec is a single sqlite-vec.c + sqlite-vec.h that can be vendored and compiled into C/C++ projects.

nodes.name: vec0 virtual table
nodes.summary: The core SQLite virtual table module for storing and querying vectors, plus non-vector metadata/auxiliary/partition-key columns.

nodes.name: Float/int8/binary vector types
nodes.summary: Supported vector element types stored in vec0 tables, with serialization helpers per binding.

nodes.name: Single-file pure-C core
nodes.summary: Entire extension is one sqlite-vec.c and sqlite-vec.h with no dependencies, vendorable and compilable anywhere SQLite runs.

nodes.name: Auto-extension registration
nodes.summary: Pattern of registering sqlite3_vec_init via sqlite3_auto_extension so every new connection loads the extension.

nodes.name: Multi-language bindings
nodes.summary: Distribution across Python, Node.js, Ruby, Go, Rust, Datasette, rqlite, and sqlite-utils.

nodes.name: WASM/browser target
nodes.summary: Extension compiles to WebAssembly to run inside SQLite in the browser.

nodes.name: Amalgamation build
nodes.summary: Release artifact bundling sqlite-vec.c and sqlite-vec.h for direct C/C++ inclusion.

nodes.name: Raw-bytes vector serialization
nodes.summary: Compact binary format (struct-packed floats/int8) that vectors use in addition to JSON input.

nodes.name: VitePress docs site
nodes.summary: Documentation and reference generation subsystem under site/ using VitePress and a VERSION-driven data loader.

nodes.name: Benchmark suites
nodes.summary: Micro benchmarks (criterion/rusqlite) and ANN dataset benchmarks with distilled embedding models.

nodes.name: Distribution pipeline
nodes.summary: sqlite-dist driven multi-target packaging: github releases, sqlpkg, spm, pip, datasette, npm, gem, amalgamation.

nodes.name: SQLITE_CORE static compilation
nodes.summary: Building sqlite-vec.c with SQLITE_CORE / SQLITE_EXTRA_INIT to statically link the extension into a host binary.

nodes.name: Vector/semantic search use cases
nodes.summary: Documented application guides: semantic search, hybrid search, RAG, classifiers, and vector arithmetic.

nodes.name: Successor to sqlite-vss
nodes.summary: sqlite-vec is positioned as the smaller, dependency-free successor to the earlier sqlite-vss extension.

nodes.name: Mozilla Builders sponsorship
nodes.summary: Project is a Mozilla Builders project with additional sponsors (Fly.io, Turso, SQLite Cloud, Shinkai).

nodes.name: Written in pure C with no dependencies
nodes.summary: README asserts the extension is pure C with no dependencies and runs anywhere SQLite runs.

nodes.name: Stores float, int8, and binary vectors
nodes.summary: vec0 tables support float, int8, and binary vector column types.

nodes.name: vec_version() returns a 'v'-prefixed string
nodes.summary: Rust test asserts the result of select vec_version() starts with 'v'.

nodes.name: Vectors accepted as JSON or compact binary
nodes.summary: README sample notes vectors can be provided as JSON or in a compact binary format.

nodes.name: serialize_float32 packs '%sf' bytes
nodes.summary: Python serialize_float32 uses struct.pack('%sf', ...) to produce the expected raw bytes.

nodes.name: Vendors SQLite amalgamation 3.45.03
nodes.summary: vendor.sh downloads the sqlite-amalgamation-3450300 zip to populate vendor/.

nodes.name: Micro benchmarks use criterion harness
nodes.summary: benchmarks/micro configures a criterion bench (my_benchmark, harness=false) with rand and zerocopy.

nodes.name: Distills bge-base to 768 dims
nodes.summary: distill-model.py distills BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5 with pca_dims=768 and saves it locally.

nodes.name: Node example requires Node >=23.5.0
nodes.summary: examples/simple-node2 sets an engines constraint of node >=23.5.0 for the built-in SQLite demo.

nodes.name: Pre-v1: expect breaking changes
nodes.summary: README warns the project is pre-v1 and breaking changes should be expected.

nodes.name: Ruby gem module is SqliteVec
nodes.summary: sqlite-dist.toml sets the gem module_name to SqliteVec.

nodes.name: Vulnerabilities reported to maintainer email
nodes.summary: SECURITY.md directs vulnerability reports to alexsebastian.garcia@gmail.com and to avoid public issues.
